positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration of a playful forest scene. The central subject is a small, whimsical fox perched on a glowing mushroom, looking out over a winding stream. Include stylized woodland elements like ferns, glowing fireflies, and oversized, simplified leaves. The aesthetic should be a blend of mid-century modern design and delicate botanical art, rendered with thick, clean lines and flat planes of color, ensuring strong silhouettes for apparel printing. Color palette: Deep sapphire blues, forest emerald greens, ochre yellows, and pops of muted copper. The composition should be highly symmetrical and centered, with ample negative space around the main characters for visual breathing room. The overall mood is magical and serene. Vector illustration, high contrast, limited color palette, print quality.
negative: blurry, grainy, noise, text, watermark, logo, signature, messy, realistic photography, photorealism, cropped, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, ugly, low contrast, muted colors
